features.name: Improved Critical
features.desc: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

features.name: Remarkable Athlete
features.desc: Add half your proficiency bonus to any STR, DEX, or CON check that doesn't already use your proficiency bonus.

features.name: Additional Fighting Style
features.desc: You can choose a second option from the Fighting Style class feature.

features.name: Superior Critical
features.desc: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 18-20.

features.name: Survivor
features.desc: At the start of each of your turns, you regain HP equal to 5 + CON modifier if you have no more than half your HP.

features.name: Combat Superiority
features.desc: You learn three maneuvers and gain four superiority dice (d8). You regain all on short or long rest.

features.name: Know Your Enemy
features.desc: Spend 1 minute observing a creature to learn if it is equal, superior, or inferior to you in two characteristics.

features.name: Improved Combat Superiority
features.desc: Your superiority dice become d10.

features.name: Relentless
features.desc: When you roll initiative and have no superiority dice remaining, you regain one.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.desc: You learn two wizard cantrips and three 1st-level wizard spells (abjuration or evocation).

features.name: War Magic
features.desc: When you use your action to cast a cantrip, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

features.name: Eldritch Strike
features.desc: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, it has disadvantage on its next saving throw against a spell you cast.

features.name: Arcane Charge
features.desc: When you use Action Surge, you can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space.

features.name: Frenzy
features.desc: While raging, you can make a single melee weapon attack as a bonus action on each of your turns. When your rage ends, you suffer one level of exhaustion.

features.name: Mindless Rage
features.desc: You can't be charmed or frightened while raging.

features.name: Intimidating Presence
features.desc: You can use your action to frighten someone with your menacing presence.

features.name: Retaliation
features.desc: When you take damage from a creature within 5 feet of you, you can use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack.

features.name: Totem Spirit
features.desc: Choose Bear (resistance to all damage except psychic while raging), Eagle (disadvantage on opportunity attacks against you), or Wolf (allies have advantage on melee attacks against hostile creatures within 5 feet of you).

features.name: Aspect of the Beast
features.desc: Gain a magical benefit based on your totem animal.

features.name: Spirit Walker
features.desc: You can cast Commune with Nature as a ritual.

features.name: Totemic Attunement
features.desc: Gain a powerful feature based on your totem animal.

features.name: Fast Hands
features.desc: You can use the bonus action granted by Cunning Action to make a Sleight of Hand check, use thieves' tools, or take the Use an Object action.

features.name: Second-Story Work
features.desc: Climbing doesn't cost extra movement, and your running jump distance increases by your DEX modifier in feet.

features.name: Supreme Sneak
features.desc: You have advantage on Stealth checks if you move no more than half your speed on the same turn.

features.name: Use Magic Device
features.desc: You can use any magic item, ignoring all class, race, and level requirements.

features.name: Assassinate
features.desc: You have advantage on attack rolls against any creature that hasn't taken a turn yet. Any hit you score against a surprised creature is a critical hit.

features.name: Infiltration Expertise
features.desc: You can create a false identity, including documentation, established acquaintances, and disguises.

features.name: Impostor
features.desc: You can unerringly mimic another person's speech, writing, and behavior.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.desc: You learn Mage Hand and two other wizard cantrips plus three 1st-level wizard spells (enchantment or illusion).

features.name: Magical Ambush
features.desc: If you are hidden from a creature when you cast a spell on it, the creature has disadvantage on any saving throw it makes against the spell.

features.name: Versatile Trickster
features.desc: You can use Mage Hand to distract a creature, giving you advantage on attack rolls against it.

features.name: Disciple of Life
features.desc: Your healing spells are more effective. Whenever you cast a healing spell, the creature regains additional HP equal to 2 + the spell's level.

features.name: Preserve Life
features.desc: Channel Divinity: Restore HP equal to 5x your cleric level, divided among any creatures within 30 feet.

features.name: Blessed Healer
features.desc: When you cast a healing spell on another creature, you also regain HP equal to 2 + the spell's level.

features.name: Divine Strike
features.desc: Once per turn, deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage with weapon attacks.

features.name: Warding Flare
features.desc: When attacked by a creature you can see within 30 feet, impose disadvantage on the attack roll.

features.name: Radiance of the Dawn
features.desc: Channel Divinity: Dispel magical darkness within 30 feet; each hostile creature takes 2d10 + cleric level radiant damage (CON save halves).

features.name: Improved Flare
features.desc: You can use Warding Flare when an ally within 30 feet is attacked.

features.name: Wrath of the Storm
features.desc: When a creature within 5 feet hits you, you can use your reaction to deal 2d8 lightning or thunder damage (DEX save halves).

features.name: Destructive Wrath
features.desc: Channel Divinity: Maximize lightning or thunder damage instead of rolling.

features.name: Thunderbolt Strike
features.desc: When you deal lightning damage to a Large or smaller creature, you can push it up to 10 feet away.

features.name: War Priest
features.desc: Make one weapon attack as a bonus action (WIS modifier times per long rest).

features.name: Guided Strike
features.desc: Channel Divinity: +10 to an attack roll.

features.name: War God's Blessing
features.desc: When an ally within 30 feet makes an attack roll, you can grant them +10 (Channel Divinity).

features.name: Blessings of Knowledge
features.desc: Proficiency in two skills from Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion (double proficiency bonus).

features.name: Knowledge of the Ages
features.desc: Channel Divinity: Gain proficiency with any skill or tool for 10 minutes.

features.name: Acolyte of Nature
features.desc: Learn one druid cantrip and gain proficiency in one of: Animal Handling, Nature, or Survival.

features.name: Charm Animals and Plants
features.desc: Channel Divinity: Charm all beasts and plants within 30 feet.

features.name: Blessing of the Trickster
features.desc: Touch a willing creature to give it advantage on Stealth checks for 1 hour.

features.name: Invoke Duplicity
features.desc: Channel Divinity: Create an illusory duplicate of yourself within 30 feet for 1 minute.

features.name: Natural Recovery
features.desc: During a short rest, recover spell slots with a combined level equal to half your druid level (rounded up).

features.name: Circle Spells
features.desc: Choose a land type (arctic, coast, desert, forest, grassland, mountain, swamp, or Underdark) to gain additional prepared spells.

features.name: Land's Stride
features.desc: Moving through nonmagical difficult terrain costs no extra movement.

features.name: Combat Wild Shape
features.desc: Use Wild Shape as a bonus action; can transform into beasts with CR as high as 1.

features.name: Primal Strike
features.desc: Your attacks in beast form count as magical for overcoming resistance.

features.name: Elemental Wild Shape
features.desc: Expend two uses of Wild Shape to transform into an air, earth, fire, or water elemental.

features.name: Sacred Weapon
features.desc: Channel Divinity: Add CHA modifier to attack rolls for 1 minute.

features.name: Turn the Unholy
features.desc: Channel Divinity: Each fiend or undead within 30 feet must make a WIS save or be turned for 1 minute.

features.name: Aura of Devotion
features.desc: You and allies within 10 feet can't be charmed.

features.name: Nature's Wrath
features.desc: Channel Divinity: Restrain a creature with spectral vines (STR/DEX save).

features.name: Aura of Warding
features.desc: You and allies within 10 feet have resistance to damage from spells.

features.name: Vow of Enmity
features.desc: Channel Divinity: Gain advantage on attack rolls against one creature for 1 minute.

features.name: Relentless Avenger
features.desc: When you hit with an opportunity attack, you can move up to half your speed immediately after.

features.name: Hunter's Prey
features.desc: Choose Colossus Slayer (+1d8 damage on wounded targets), Giant Killer (reaction attack when Large+ creature misses), or Horde Breaker (attack a second creature within 5 feet).

features.name: Defensive Tactics
features.desc: Choose Escape the Horde, Multiattack Defense, or Steel Will.

features.name: Ranger's Companion
features.desc: Gain a beast companion with CR 1/4 or lower. It obeys your commands and acts on your turn.

features.name: Exceptional Training
features.desc: Your companion can Dash, Disengage, or Help as a bonus action on its turn.

features.name: Open Hand Technique
features.desc: When you hit with a Flurry of Blows attack, you can knock the target prone, push it 15 feet, or prevent it from taking reactions.

features.name: Wholeness of Body
features.desc: As an action, regain HP equal to 3x your monk level. Once per long rest.

features.name: Tranquility
features.desc: At the end of a long rest, gain the effect of a Sanctuary spell until your next long rest.

features.name: Shadow Arts
features.desc: Spend 2 ki to cast Darkness, Darkvision, Pass without Trace, or Silence.

features.name: Shadow Step
features.desc: Teleport up to 60 feet from one area of dim light/darkness to another, gaining advantage on your first melee attack.

features.name: Disciple of the Elements
features.desc: Learn elemental disciplines that let you spend ki to cast spells (Burning Hands, Thunderwave, etc.).

features.name: Elemental Attunement
features.desc: Use an action to create minor elemental effects (harmless tremor, instant fire, brief wind gust, or mist).

features.name: Cutting Words
features.desc: Use Bardic Inspiration to subtract the die roll from an enemy's attack roll, ability check, or damage roll.

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.desc: Gain proficiency in any three skills of your choice.

features.name: Additional Magical Secrets
features.desc: Learn two spells from any class.

features.name: Combat Inspiration
features.desc: Bardic Inspiration die can be added to a weapon damage roll or to AC against one attack.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.desc: You can attack twice when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Draconic Resilience
features.desc: Your HP maximum increases by 1 per level. When unarmored, your AC equals 13 + DEX modifier.

features.name: Elemental Affinity
features.desc: When you cast a spell that deals damage of your dragon ancestry type, add CHA modifier to one damage roll.

features.name: Wild Magic Surge
features.desc: After casting a sorcerer spell of 1st level or higher, roll a d20. On a 1, roll on the Wild Magic Surge table.

features.name: Tides of Chaos
features.desc: Gain advantage on one attack roll, ability check, or saving throw. Recharges on long rest or Wild Magic Surge.

features.name: Bend Luck
features.desc: Spend 2 sorcery points to add or subtract 1d4 from another creature's attack roll, ability check, or saving throw.

features.name: Fey Presence
features.desc: As an action, each creature in a 10-foot cube must make a WIS save or be charmed or frightened for 1 turn.

features.name: Misty Escape
features.desc: When you take damage, you can use your reaction to turn invisible and teleport up to 60 feet.

features.name: Dark One's Blessing
features.desc: When you reduce a hostile creature to 0 HP, you gain temporary HP equal to CHA modifier + warlock level.

features.name: Dark One's Own Luck
features.desc: When you make an ability check or saving throw, add a d10 to the roll. Once per short or long rest.

features.name: Awakened Mind
features.desc: You can communicate telepathically with any creature within 30 feet that can understand at least one language.

features.name: Entropic Ward
features.desc: When a creature makes an attack roll against you, impose disadvantage. If the attack misses, your next attack against the creature has advantage.

features.name: Sculpt Spells
features.desc: When you cast an evocation spell, choose a number of creatures equal to 1 + the spell's level. Those creatures automatically succeed on their saving throw and take no damage.

features.name: Potent Cantrip
features.desc: When a creature succeeds on a saving throw against your cantrip, it still takes half the cantrip's damage.

features.name: Empowered Evocation
features.desc: Add your INT modifier to one damage roll of any wizard evocation spell you cast.

features.name: Portent
features.desc: After a long rest, roll two d20s and record the numbers. You can replace any attack roll, saving throw, or ability check by you or a creature you can see with one of these rolls.

features.name: Expert Divination
features.desc: When you cast a divination spell of 2nd level or higher, you regain one expended spell slot of a lower level.

features.name: Arcane Ward
features.desc: When you cast an abjuration spell of 1st level or higher, create a magical ward with HP equal to twice your wizard level + INT modifier.

features.name: Projected Ward
features.desc: When an ally within 30 feet takes damage, you can use your reaction to have your Arcane Ward absorb the damage instead.

features.name: Grim Harvest
features.desc: When you kill a creature with a spell of 1st level or higher, you regain HP equal to twice the spell's level (3x for necromancy spells).

features.name: Undead Thralls
features.desc: When you cast Animate Dead, you can target one additional corpse or pile of bones, and undead you create have extra HP and damage.

features.name: Improved Minor Illusion
features.desc: You learn the Minor Illusion cantrip and can create both a sound and an image with a single casting.

features.name: Malleable Illusions
features.desc: When you cast an illusion spell with a duration of 1 minute or longer, you can use your action to change the nature of that illusion.

features.name: Hypnotic Gaze
features.desc: As an action, charm a creature within 5 feet (WIS save). While charmed, the creature is incapacitated and its speed is 0.

features.name: Instinctive Charm
features.desc: When an attacker you can see within 30 feet attacks you, redirect the attack to another creature (WIS save negates).

features.name: Minor Conjuration
features.desc: As an action, conjure an inanimate object no larger than 3 feet on a side and no more than 10 pounds.

features.name: Benign Transposition
features.desc: Teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space, or swap places with a willing Small or Medium creature.

features.name: Minor Alchemy
features.desc: Temporarily transform one nonmagical object from one substance to another (wood to stone, metal to silver, etc.).

features.name: Transmuter's Stone
features.desc: Create a stone that grants darkvision 60 ft, +10 ft speed, proficiency in CON saves, or resistance to one damage type.
